note: AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/sync-audit-reports.mjs — do not edit by hand. Mirrors docs/master-audit-report.json + docs/audits/* so /admin/audits can show audit reports in-app. Owner status tracking lives in audit-status-overrides.json.

findings.finding: og-default.png, icon-192.png, icon-512.png referenced but absent from apps/web/public (verified: only robots.txt + llms.txt present)
findings.recommendation: Add real artwork or implement app/opengraph-image.tsx + app/icon.tsx (brand green #1a3a2a, SQ wordmark)
findings.businessImpact: Blank link previews on every share; no favicon; PWA not installable; Org logo in JSON-LD 404s

findings.finding: ~16 public marketing pages mid-edit (theme tokenization) skipped by the SEO audit
findings.recommendation: Commit theme-tokenization work, then re-audit + tokenize those pages
findings.businessImpact: Delays consistent branding + re-audit coverage

findings.finding: Sport-analysis & other pages hand-roll metadata + JSON-LD instead of buildMetadata()/jsonLd.ts
findings.recommendation: Migrate hand-rolled pages onto shared helpers
findings.businessImpact: Inconsistent canonicals/Twitter cards; weaker Org linkage; drift risk

findings.finding: llms.txt claims SwingVantage does not do computer-vision pixel analysis; may conflict with live AI-vision analyzer
findings.recommendation: Verify against current video analyzer; correct the claim
findings.businessImpact: Inaccurate claim erodes trust + AI-engine accuracy

findings.finding: No skip-to-content link; focus rings only Tailwind default; no breadcrumb component
findings.recommendation: Add skip-link to AppShell, standardize visible focus, build breadcrumb component
findings.businessImpact: Harder for keyboard/screen-reader users; WCAG gap

findings.finding: /sessions/import/image and /sessions/log lack back links (dead-end risk)
findings.recommendation: Add back/return links
findings.businessImpact: Users can get stuck mid-workflow

findings.finding: Conflict: staged audit says /features, /resources, /glossary not created; strategy doc lists glossary/blog/features/benchmarks as built
findings.recommendation: Verify which hub pages exist now; fill remaining gaps; run monthly content calendar
findings.businessImpact: Missed long-tail/AEO coverage if gaps remain

findings.finding: BreadcrumbList + HowTo JSON-LD deferred on sport-analysis pages
findings.recommendation: Add breadcrumb + HowTo schema (rides on F-05)
findings.businessImpact: Fewer rich-result/answer-engine surfaces

findings.finding: Site-wide Organization + WebSite nodes were missing; fixed on homepage
findings.recommendation: Spread Org linkage via F-03 standardization
findings.businessImpact: Improves who-are-you signals for AI engines

findings.finding: llms.txt answer-page coverage was sparse; fixed (categorized full listing)
findings.recommendation: Keep updated as pages ship
findings.businessImpact: More answer pages discoverable by AI crawlers

findings.finding: GitHub branch protection on master, secret scanning, Dependabot alerts/auto-updates, private vuln reporting not enabled
findings.recommendation: Flip the four switches in GitHub Settings
findings.businessImpact: CI runs but does not gate merges; no auto dep fixes

findings.finding: OpenAI API key was in a local plaintext file - treat as compromised
findings.recommendation: Rotate key; update .env.local + Vercel
findings.businessImpact: Key abuse / unexpected billing risk

findings.finding: ADMIN_SECRET and CRON_SECRET not set for production
findings.recommendation: Generate (openssl rand -hex 32); set in .env.local + Vercel
findings.businessImpact: Admin panel + cron endpoints unprotected if deployed without them

findings.finding: Supabase RLS migration + private storage buckets not yet applied
findings.recommendation: Apply RLS SQL; set buckets to private
findings.businessImpact: Row-level data exposure once cloud is live

findings.finding: Privacy Policy + Terms are placeholders; no COPPA/GDPR/CCPA review
findings.recommendation: Attorney review before commercial launch
findings.businessImpact: Legal exposure before paid/youth scale

findings.finding: No cloud delete-my-account-and-data flow or documented retention policy
findings.recommendation: Build account-deletion flow; document retention
findings.businessImpact: COPPA/GDPR deletion-right gap once cloud accounts ship

findings.finding: Professional swing references use PLACEHOLDER_REQUIRES_ADMIN_VERIFICATION video IDs
findings.recommendation: Verify real YouTube IDs; set verified: true
findings.businessImpact: Reference library looks unfinished; trust dip

findings.finding: No error monitoring (Sentry) or uptime monitoring configured
findings.recommendation: Add Sentry + uptime monitor before launch
findings.businessImpact: Outages/errors invisible in production

findings.finding: Analytics not connected; growth-report KPI table is empty
findings.recommendation: Connect GA4/PostHog/Plausible; set up GSC; fill KPIs
findings.businessImpact: Cannot measure funnel, drop-off, or any KPI - blocks the growth loop

findings.finding: Core Web Vitals + live-crawl checks pending production deploy
findings.recommendation: Run CWV + crawl after first deploy
findings.businessImpact: Unknown real-world performance/SEO health

findings.finding: Sitemap not yet submitted to Google Search Console / Bing
findings.recommendation: Submit sitemap.xml post-deploy (~30 min)
findings.businessImpact: Slower indexing/discovery

findings.finding: OCR auto-extraction service built but inactive (needs API key integration)
findings.recommendation: Integrate OCR provider key; activate
findings.businessImpact: Image-import friction (manual entry only)

findings.finding: No E2E navigation tests (Playwright)
findings.recommendation: Add Playwright journey tests
findings.businessImpact: Regressions in nav/journeys can slip through

findings.finding: 7 jsx-a11y rules set to warn (pre-existing violations); ~126 lint warnings
findings.recommendation: Burn down the 7 warn-rules in older surfaces
findings.businessImpact: Latent a11y issues remain

findings.finding: AI Coach memory/session continuity not built; AI-enhancement backlog (latest model IDs, prompt caching, fallbacks)
findings.recommendation: Run the AI audit; add session-memory context
findings.businessImpact: Weaker retention moat; missed AI quality gains

findings.finding: Email templates exist but no provider connected; no welcome sequence
findings.recommendation: Connect provider; build welcome series
findings.businessImpact: Lost re-engagement; leads not nurtured

findings.finding: No payment processing (Stripe) implemented
findings.recommendation: Implement Stripe Checkout + webhooks before paid tier
findings.businessImpact: Cannot monetize

findings.finding: Production HTTP security headers need post-deploy verification
findings.recommendation: Verify at securityheaders.com after deploy
findings.businessImpact: Misconfig could weaken CSP/clickjacking defense

findings.finding: Parse error seen in video/SportVideoAnalyzerContent.tsx during audit dev run; tsc now clean
findings.recommendation: Confirm builds clean on the committed tree
findings.businessImpact: Possible transient/already-fixed

findings.finding: Blog /blog/how-to-stop-topping-the-golf-ball has an IDENTICAL title to guide /golf/stop-topping-the-ball (same intent)
findings.recommendation: OWNER DECISION: guide is the canonical target - differentiate blog + cross-link, OR canonicalize blog->guide, OR noindex/merge. See docs/seo/duplicate-cannibalization-report.md
findings.businessImpact: Two pages compete for the same query; split ranking signals

findings.finding: Blog /blog/how-to-fix-a-golf-slice near-duplicates guide /golf/fix-slice (same 'how to fix a slice' intent)
findings.recommendation: OWNER DECISION: differentiate (blog = '5 causes' explainer linking to the fix) OR canonicalize/merge. See docs/seo/duplicate-cannibalization-report.md
findings.businessImpact: Keyword cannibalization on a primary term

findings.finding: Blog /blog/slow-pitch-softball-stop-popping-up overlaps guide /softball/stop-popping-up (same intent)
findings.recommendation: OWNER DECISION: pick one primary, cross-link the other (or canonicalize/merge). See docs/seo/duplicate-cannibalization-report.md
findings.businessImpact: Split ranking signals on a softball query

findings.finding: Blog /blog/how-to-stop-rolling-over-in-baseball overlaps guide /baseball/stop-rolling-over (same intent)
findings.recommendation: OWNER DECISION: pick one primary, cross-link/canonicalize/merge. See docs/seo/duplicate-cannibalization-report.md
findings.businessImpact: Keyword cannibalization on a baseball query

findings.finding: Blog /blog/pickleball-third-shot-drop-guide duplicates the topic of guide /pickleball-third-shot-drop
findings.recommendation: OWNER DECISION: guide is the silo page - differentiate/cross-link OR canonicalize/merge. See docs/seo/duplicate-cannibalization-report.md
findings.businessImpact: Two pages on the same pickleball topic compete

findings.finding: Blog /blog/padel-bandeja-explained duplicates the topic of guide /padel-bandeja
findings.recommendation: OWNER DECISION: guide is the silo page - differentiate/cross-link OR canonicalize/merge. See docs/seo/duplicate-cannibalization-report.md
findings.businessImpact: Two pages on the same padel topic compete

findings.finding: New sitemap.xml + HTML sitemap (/sitemap) + top-20 priority URLs need Google Search Console submission (extends F-21)
findings.recommendation: OWNER: submit sitemap.xml, then inspect/request-index the first 20. Runbook: docs/seo/gsc-submission-checklist.md + docs/seo/priority-submit-urls.md (provisional list, pending approval)
findings.businessImpact: Faster discovery/indexing of the refreshed URL set
